Why Choose Us
Skin Deserves the Best of Nature

Every Herbiva bar is made by hand, in small batches, using the finest natural ingredients. No sulphates, no parabens, no synthetic fragrances — ever.

🌿

100% Natural Ingredients

Real herbs, essential oils, cold-pressed oils, goat milk, turmeric, honey — nothing artificial.

🧴

Zero Harmful Chemicals

No SLS, no parabens, no synthetic preservatives. Safe for all skin types including babies.

✋

Handcrafted in Small Batches

Every bar is made with love and care. No mass production — just careful, artisan craftsmanship.

🎁

Custom & Gift Orders

Want a custom soap for gifting, events or corporate orders? We make all types of customised soaps!

🌱
Pure & Natural Every single ingredient
How We Make It
From Nature to Your Skin

Every Herbiva soap goes through a careful, artisan process to ensure maximum goodness in every bar.

01
🌿

Natural Sourcing

We hand-pick the finest herbs, essential oils & natural ingredients — turmeric, coconut oil, goat milk and more.

02
⚗️

Cold Pressing

Oils are cold-pressed to retain maximum nutrients, vitamins & skin benefits that heat destroys.

03
✋

Handcrafting

Poured, shaped and designed by hand in small batches — each bar is unique and made with care.

04
⏳

Curing

Soaps are left to cure for weeks, developing a long-lasting, gentle bar that's kind to your skin.

Unique Creation
Grape Soap Bunch

Our signature decorative grape soap — made with real grape essence and crafted on natural jute rope. Perfect for gifting or display. Double as hand wash or home décor.
